title: Xtra Silky Kenyan Tomato Skewers
description: A fatty and silky solo dinner dish featuring char-grilled baby plum tomatoes, this Kenyan inspired recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut oil, ginger paste, garlic-free seasoning blend, salt, and black pepper.
Add the halved baby plum tomatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated tomatoes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each tomato.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the tomatoes are charred and tender.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
Let the skewers rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve with your choice of sides, such as grilled meats or roasted vegetables.
